sections.paragraph:
f. (from the root צָפַר No. 1)-

(1) prop. a crown, Isa 28:5.

(2) a circle, a circuit; hence used of the vicissitude of events and fortune, as if going in a circle (compare סְבִיבֹות Ecc 1:6). Eze 7:7, בָּאָה הַצְּפִירָה אֵלֶיךָ “the circle comes to thee,” which is well rendered by Abulwalid انتهى الدور اليك.
